title: Three arrested in separate attempted murder cases
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Three men have been...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Three men have been arrested in connection with two separate attempted murder cases.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Three men have been arrested in connection with two separate attempted murder cases."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, said the first incident occurred at about 23:00 on 6 December, when a 20-year-old had been out walking home in Fairview, and was accosted by a group of men."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The man sustained injuries to his neck, back and body. The Da Gamaskop Police arrested two suspects, both aged 21, shortly afterwards.","html":"The man sustained injuries to his neck, back and body. The Da Gamaskop Police arrested two suspects, both aged 21, shortly afterwards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the second, unrelated incident, a 16-year-old boy was found in Bill Jeffery Drive with multiple injuries just after midnight on Monday 8 December.","html":"In the second, unrelated incident, a 16-year-old boy was found in Bill Jeffery Drive with multiple injuries just after midnight on Monday 8 December."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police have since arrested a 22-year-old man.","html":"The police have since arrested a 22-year-old man."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The suspects were set to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court earlier this week.","html":"The suspects were set to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court earlier this week."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Three arrested in separate attempted murder cases
